name: agentplugins-teams
description: Orchestration plugins for agentplugins — roster, orchestrator, and teams workflows

notes.localDev: v0.5.0 not yet published. Symlink local core for development: ln -s ../../agentplugins/packages/core node_modules/@agentplugins/core
notes.cliDev: agentplugins build requires @agentplugins/cli globally: npm i -g @agentplugins/cli (or use the local link from the main repo build)
